prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your business succession forward
items: Schedule a consultation with a business attorney to review your current business structure and succession options
Create a comprehensive inventory of all business licenses, permits, and regulatory compliance requirements that will need to be transferred or updated
Draft and review your business operating agreement or shareholder agreement to include specific succession clauses and ownership transfer mechanisms
